description: Port src/app/api/dashboard/workflows/[workflow]/route.ts into API Gateway/Lambda so dashboard care workflow links work without Next. Scope: support GET /api/dashboard/workflows/{workflow}; allow only known workflow slugs such as messaging, file_upload, and intro_video; verify Cognito patient session; request the MDI embedded workflow URL through requestMdiWorkflowUrlDynamoDb; redirect with HTTP 303 to the provider URL on success; redirect to /dashboard?workflow=unavailable for invalid/failed workflow requests; avoid exposing vendor error details. Wire route in CDK, including a path parameter. Acceptance criteria: live route exists; invalid workflow redirects safely; valid mocked workflow redirects with 303; tests cover auth failure, invalid workflow, repository unavailable, and success.
title: Add Lambda/API Gateway route for MDI dashboard workflow redirects
